content: I go by Guy. If you’d like the full name, it’s on my CV — but most people just call me Guy.

Nice to meet you, Chongming. Welcome to the site.

If you ever prefer to switch to Mandarin, just let me know — happy to chat in either language. What brings you here today?
what is my name and what do i like?

Your name is Chongming, and you told me you like coding. 

Am I remembering correctly?
